title: Infosys and LTA launch AI-driven tennis fan experiences
detailed_summary: Infosys announced AI-powered fan experiences with the Lawn Tennis Association for the LTA grass court season, including a new Match Centre and on-site Fan Zone at the HSBC Championships at The Queen's Club from June 6 - 21, 2026. The announcement highlights Infosys Topaz, generative AI, agentic AI, personalization, and responsible AI governance, but provides no financial value or commercial terms.

key_facts.fact: Infosys unveiled a new suite of AI-powered fan experiences in partnership with the Lawn Tennis Association for the LTA grass court season.
The AI-powered innovations include Infosys Match Center, AI Commentary, personalized fan experience, fan polls, and match statistics and head-to-head insights.

key_facts.fact: At the HSBC Championships at The Queen's Club, scheduled from June 6 - 21, 2026, Infosys will host a Fan Zone featuring Rally and VR Tennis.

partnerships_or_deals.description: Infosys and the Lawn Tennis Association launched AI-powered match and fan experiences across the LTA grass court season, building on their ongoing strategic collaboration.
